title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kinemon, Unknown person #6, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If I can survive this scalding...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is he going on about?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kozuki had something to do with the closure of the country....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What did you learn at sea....?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A very long time ago... those who sank this country from the outside world

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: were the members of the Kozuki clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was to protect Wano from a "Gigantic Power"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wano country, no...the world is waiting for a particular individual!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When that individual appears traversing through 800 years of time,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When that individual appears traversing through 800 years of time, we must be a country that can welcome and support him/her,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must be a country that can welcome and support him/her,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Those guys will definitely kill me today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No...!! if you really can resist the boiling, then...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A third of the time has already passed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's the case then we will do it with e-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It had become a deadly heated hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you still alive!!?? Raise the temperature!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even in this heat, you don't die? Who is this man

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And once again the whole country is my ally!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
